name: Stage 1 — Harbor District
_notes: Waves anchor to the CAMMOV camera path (camera.bin). The path has 3 deep dwell arenas — A@~4s harbor (cam -107,274), B@~74s (368,-165), C@~173s (-363,-886) — separated by two long FAST-travel runs (A->B ~32-70s, B->C ~92-168s, 15-37 u/s). The original streamed enemies through those runs (placement data locked in PG_STG1.DLL, undecoded), so a lone far-ahead 'transit' spawn just gets rushed past by the moving rail = the empty-middle / 'enemies blow by' feel. Fix: the travel runs now carry their own clearPoint ambush arenas (A2@56 TOYLAND street, B2@112 elevated highway, B3@160 industrial street past the overpass) — the camera halts and the player clears them like A/B/C instead of blowing past stationary spawns. Positions are camera-relative offsets (x=right, -z=ahead) resolved + ground-raycast at spawn, kept at A/B/C engagement distance (z -12..-21). Verify spawn geometry with tools/extract-stage-assets/verify-waves.mjs. Path cuts/loops at ~196s so duration ends the round before that. Arena placement is a hand-authored approximation pending a PG_STG1.DLL decode.
